title: Alien Craft Lands In A Field In Rainhill England
description: The mystery surrounding an apparent sighting of a UFO above a power station 25 years ago deepened further when an amateur radio operator raised the possibility the ‘light in the sky’ actually landed in a local farmer’s [...]

title: Ghost Hunters, UFO Researchers and Paranormal Experts Gather in DeKalb for Obscura Paracon March 21–22
description: Speakers from television, paranormal research groups, and supernatural investigations will present lectures, workshops, and interactive experiences.

title: 'I found one of the US Military's missing nuclear bombs - I thought it was a UFO'
description: A diver off the coast of British Columbia thought he'd discovered a UFO on the ocean floor, but what he found was far more chilling.

title: ‘I thought I saw a UFO, but it was actually a nuclear bomb now lost at sea for anyone to find’
description: The US has a total of six missing nuclear warheads out of 32 known accidents - with one diver finding a bomb powerful enough to obliterate a city

title: 'I found one of the US Army's missing nuclear bombs - I thought it was a UFO'
description: A diver off the coast of British Columbia was searching for fish when he discovered a mysterious object on the Pacific Ocean floor - but the UFO-shaped find turned out to be far more alarming
